## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss The Adventures Group's recent sales decline and explore strategies for improvement with GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Adventures Group experiencing 10% sales drop in March, particularly in paid channels](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Organic traffic performing well, but paid media seeing higher costs and lower conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [GrowthX offers to review paid strategy and provide free consultation on optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Potential synergy between organic and paid strategies to be explored, with focus on retargeting and intent-matching](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

## Topics

### Current Performance Analysis

  - [Organic traffic performing well, showing growth](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Paid channels (primarily Google, then Meta) experiencing issues:](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Higher cost-per-click](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
      - [Increased traffic but lower conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
      - [Resulting in expensive customer acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Overall company sales up, but online channel underperforming](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Spending approx. $1 million/year on paid advertising](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)

### Recent Changes and Variables

  - [New website design implemented ($700,000 investment)](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Changed paid media agency](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Multiple simultaneous changes creating difficulty in isolating problem variables](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Considerations

  - [Agency proposed CRO plan costing $18,000-$21,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)
  - [Marcel suggests this might be overpriced for the scope](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Emphasis on matching landing page content to user intent for better conversions](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Potential for AI-driven dynamic page creation to match search intents](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)

### Paid Media Strategy Recommendations

  - [Reduce reliance on paid as primary channel due to volatility](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Focus on retargeting strategies:](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Pixel visitors for future targeted ads](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Use search modifiers to increase bids for previous site visitors](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Implement abandoned cart campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Minimize spend on cold audiences, optimize for warm audiences familiar with the brand](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)

### Organic and Paid Synergy

  - [Leverage strong organic performance to create retargeting pools](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Use content to attract visitors, then retarget with paid ads on platforms like Instagram](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Expand organic reach to increase the pool of potential customers for paid retargeting](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)

### Collaboration and Next Steps

  - [Plan a brainstorming session with new paid agency and GrowthX to align strategies](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [Adventures Group to send previous agency reports for GrowthX review](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [GrowthX offers to provide free audit and recommendations](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Potential introductions to trusted paid media partners for second opinions](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adventures Group to discuss internally and decide on next actions](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
  - [If agreed, send previous agency reports to GrowthX for review](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [Schedule brainstorming session with new paid agency and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare recommendations based on report review](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
  - [Consider GrowthX's offer for introductions to additional paid media partners](https://fathom.video/share/-zyG5nthMwk19UJL18xyEfk5wosXJGY_?tab=summary&timestamp=1071.0)
